preamble: The shift from the diphthong [oi] to [ui] involves the raising of the first element of the diphthong.

examples.note: Raising of the initial vowel in the diphthong.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
